_source: Manual May 2026 reference (Phase 1 MVP). Phase 2 will replace with weekly auto-scrape.
_notes: Croatia (Jadrolinija) prices VAT 25% included, anchored to Biograd→Tkon reference (€2.20 adult, €10.40 car ≤5m). Storebælt/Øresund/Scandlines prices in EUR (DKK→EUR @ ~7.46). Ancona-Split and Bari-Dubrovnik are deck-passage with car (one-way, low season).

storebaelt._note: Bridge toll — single crossing, no passenger fees. Prepaid BroBizen ~25% cheaper.

oresund._note: Bridge toll DK↔SE — single crossing, no passenger fees. BroPas subscribers ~50% cheaper.

puttgarden-rodby._note: Scandlines ferry. Driver and up to 9 passengers included in car ticket.

ancona-split._note: Deck passage (no cabin), low season. Cabin upgrade +€40-€120.

bari-dubrovnik._note: Deck passage (no cabin), low season. Cabin upgrade +€40-€120.
